details.test: Task 1: Save three on-base 3BR homes under $1,900 to Favorites
Task 2: Request childcare tour at highest-rated center within 10 miles, open after 6 PM
Task 3: Compare two qualifying housing units and save cheaper to Apply Later
Task 4: Save two high-rated businesses to Meal Options custom list
Task 5: Submit medium-priority HVAC maintenance request
Task 6: Register account and save a 10%+ barber coupon
Task 7: Schedule oil change under $60 at 4+ star auto shop
Task 8: Start reservation for cheapest free-parking lodging for family of three
Task 9: RSVP to next-month housing event and add to dashboard
